# UAT Instructions

Applies to Antigravity and live UAT documentation or reports.

- Read `.ai/contracts/ANTIGRAVITY_UAT_CONTRACT.md` first.
- Antigravity is one-shot UAT only.
- Reject `REQUEST_ID=N/A`.
- Reject `build=legacy`.
- Reject screenshot-only proof.
- Require raw telemetry, `PASS_STAGES`, `ABSENT_STAGES`, `FIRST_FAIL_STAGE`, and exact commit SHA.
